base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_atlas — a character (minion) from 1987 mega man. Enemy roster — Metool (hard-hat turtle), Sniper Joe, Picket Man, Big Eye, Crazy Razy, Bunby Heli, Beak, Bladers, Super Cutter, Screw Driver, Watcher, Foot Holder, Octopus Battery, Flying Shell, etc. 626×337 canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
